summary: Completed Phase 3 & Bug Fixes testing for CliniKQ. Backend APIs (17/18 tests passed). Frontend functionality working correctly with one infrastructure issue. Fixed 2 bugs during testing.

minor.issue: Static files (logos) not accessible via public URL - Kubernetes ingress only routes /api/* to backend, /uploads/* paths return React app HTML
minor.note: Infrastructure routing issue, not a code bug. Backend correctly serves files on internal port 8001

ui_bugs.issue: Logo image shows broken/placeholder icon because /uploads/* path not routed to backend
ui_bugs.note: Frontend code is correct - issue is infrastructure routing

issues: React hydration warnings for span inside select/option elements - functional but console warnings

bugs_fixed_during_testing.bug: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added timezone handling for slot_time parsing - ensure datetime is always timezone-aware

bugs_fixed_during_testing.bug: ResponseValidationError: start_time and end_time fields required but missing in legacy appointments
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Made start_time and end_time Optional in Appointment model for backward compatibility

bug_fixes_tested: Set Password page with activation token - PASSED

action_items: INFRASTRUCTURE: Configure Kubernetes ingress to route /uploads/* paths to backend (port 8001) for static file serving
OPTIONAL: Consider serving static files via /api/uploads/* prefix as workaround

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows working, logo display has infrastructure issue)

seed_data_creation: Reset activation token for sachin@bharatsure.com, created multiple test appointments
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Smart Appointment Engine APIs fully working. Double-booking prevention active. Static file serving needs infrastructure fix for /uploads/* route. The BookAppointment frontend does NOT use available-slots API yet - it uses datetime-local input directly.

mocked_apis.email_notifications: Email sending is mocked (console log only). No actual emails sent for activation links.
